test_cases.name: happy_path_standard_linear_thread
test_cases.scenario: Process a standard 3-message linear email thread with clear questions and requests, using default inputs to test full pipeline execution.

email_thread.subject: Project Timeline Update
email_thread.body: Hi Bob, can you provide an update on the Q1 deliverables? We need to finalize the timeline by end of week. Thanks.

email_thread.subject: Re: Project Timeline Update
email_thread.body: Alice, I've completed the design phase but the backend integration is delayed. Should be ready by Jan 22. Can we push the deadline?

email_thread.subject: Re: Project Timeline Update
email_thread.body: Bob, Jan 22 works but we need to confirm with stakeholders. Can you send me a revised timeline document by tomorrow?

test_cases.expected_behavior: Response should address both the timeline question and the document request, confirm the Jan 22 date, and provide clear next steps for stakeholder confirmation.

test_cases.name: happy_path_with_tone_override
test_cases.scenario: Process a semi-formal thread but override tone to formal to test tone_override input handling and output consistency.

email_thread.subject: Feature Request
email_thread.body: Hey team, would love to see a bulk export feature in the next release. This would save us tons of time. Let me know if it's feasible!

email_thread.subject: Re: Feature Request
email_thread.body: Thanks for the suggestion! We're evaluating it. Can you tell us more about your use case?

test_cases.expected_behavior: Response should maintain formal tone despite casual thread, acknowledge feature request professionally, and request detailed use case information.

test_cases.name: edge_case_unknown_relationship
test_cases.scenario: Process thread where responder_relationship_to_sender is unknown to test clarifying statement requirement in response opening.

email_thread.subject: Budget Approval Request
email_thread.body: Hi, I need approval for a $50K marketing campaign. Can you review the attached proposal and let me know if you can sign off?

test_cases.expected_behavior: Response should include a clarifying statement in the opening to establish relationship context before addressing the approval request.

test_cases.name: edge_case_single_message_thread
test_cases.scenario: Process minimal thread with only one message to test handling of short threads with limited context.

email_thread.subject: Urgent: Server Outage
email_thread.body: URGENT: Production server is down. Can someone investigate immediately and provide status update within 30 minutes?

test_cases.expected_behavior: Response should match urgent tone, confirm immediate action, and commit to status update timeline.

test_cases.name: edge_case_escalating_emotional_trajectory
test_cases.scenario: Process thread with escalating frustration to test emotional_trajectory detection and empathetic tone requirement.

email_thread.subject: Implementation Status
email_thread.body: Hi, just checking in on the implementation timeline. When can we expect the first release?

email_thread.subject: Re: Implementation Status
email_thread.body: We're on track for mid-February. I'll send you a detailed update next week.

email_thread.subject: Re: Implementation Status
email_thread.body: It's been 4 days and I haven't received the update. This is concerning. We need visibility into what's happening. Why is communication so poor?

test_cases.expected_behavior: Response should open with empathy, acknowledge frustration, apologize for communication gap, and provide immediate detailed update with clear timeline.

test_cases.name: error_handling_missing_required_field
test_cases.scenario: Process thread with missing sender field in one message to test error handling and field validation.

email_thread.subject: Meeting Request
email_thread.body: Can we schedule a meeting to discuss the proposal?

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill should flag missing sender field in validation_notes with category 'warning' and continue processing with available data.

test_cases.name: error_handling_out_of_order_timestamps
test_cases.scenario: Process thread with messages out of chronological order to test reordering logic.

email_thread.subject: Follow-up
email_thread.body: Did you get a chance to review?

email_thread.subject: Document Sent
email_thread.body: I've sent you the document for review.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill should reorder messages by timestamp and document the reordering in validation_notes with category 'info'.

test_cases.name: quality_gate_resolution_score_boundary
test_cases.scenario: Process thread with multiple unresolved points to test resolution score calculation at boundary (score ~70).

email_thread.subject: Q1 Deliverables - Multiple Questions
email_thread.body: Hi, I have several questions: (1) What's the budget allocation? (2) Who's the technical lead? (3) What's the risk mitigation plan? (4) When's the kickoff meeting? (5) How will we handle scope changes?

test_cases.expected_behavior: Response should address all 5 questions with varying levels of detail, resulting in resolution_score between 65-75 to test boundary condition.

test_cases.name: quality_gate_response_length_limit
test_cases.scenario: Process thread with many must-address points to test length_flag and prioritization when response would exceed 500 words.

email_thread.subject: Comprehensive Project Feedback
email_thread.body: We've reviewed the proposal. Questions: (1) Architecture approach? (2) Technology stack rationale? (3) Team composition? (4) Timeline breakdown? (5) Cost breakdown? (6) Support model? (7) Training plan? (8) Maintenance terms? (9) SLA guarantees? (10) Escalation process?

test_cases.expected_behavior: Response should prioritize must-address points, defer nice-to-address items, and document deferrals with deferral_reason in addressed_points.

test_cases.name: quality_gate_tone_consistency_validation
test_cases.scenario: Process thread requiring formal tone to test tone_consistency_check validation and consistency across response sections.

email_thread.subject: Board Presentation - Data Requirements
email_thread.body: We need comprehensive metrics for the board presentation next week. Please provide: quarterly performance data, risk assessment, and strategic recommendations. This is high priority.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Response should maintain formal tone throughout all sections, with no casual language or tone shifts, and tone_consistency_check should return consistent=true.
